User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Block AI training crawlers (does not affect Google Search or AI Overviews)
User-agent: GPTBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: ChatGPT-User
Disallow: /

User-agent: Google-Extended
Disallow: /

User-agent: Bytespider
Disallow: /

User-agent: CCBot
Disallow: /

Sitemap: https://starburstslots.co.za/sitemap-index.xml
